page_metadata.biotools__summary: AutoCoEv is a high-throughput in silico pipeline for predicting novel protein-protein interactions. It is a user-friendly computational pipeline for the search of coevolution between hundreds and even thousands of proteins.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: AutoCoEv is a high-throughput in silico pipeline for predicting novel protein-protein interactions. It is a user-friendly computational pipeline for the search of coevolution between hundreds and even thousands of proteins.
